task_completion.description: Open the target invoice HTML file in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'file:///workspace/assets/vendor_invoice.html' and the invoice is displayed.

task_completion.description: Use browser tools to remove the distracting elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser Developer Tools (Inspector/Elements tab) is open, showing the agent selecting, hiding, or deleting the HTML nodes corresponding to the promotional banner, chat widget, or cookie footer.

task_completion.description: Ensure the page is clean of all specified distractions while keeping invoice details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered web page or print preview clearly shows the invoice details (e.g., 'Invoice #8492', 'Total: 1,240.50') but completely lacks the 'FLASH SALE' banner, 'Chat with Agent' widget, and 'We use cookies' footer.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process to save the page as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's Print dialog is open with the destination set to 'Save as PDF' or 'Print to File'.

task_completion.description: Save the clean PDF to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or file manager shows the file being saved as 'invoice_8492_clean.pdf' inside the 'Documents/Invoices' (or '/home/ga/Documents/Invoices/') directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser GUI to view and modify the invoice.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical web browser being used, rather than terminal commands (like sed, grep, or wkhtmltopdf) doing all the work silently.

integrity.description: Distracting elements were genuinely removed or hidden from the rendered page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements are actually gone from the page layout in the browser or print preview, not just scrolled out of view or covered by other windows.

integrity.description: The HTML was rendered in a browser, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The invoice is viewed in a web browser with proper CSS rendering, not opened as raw HTML source code in a text editor like gedit or nano for printing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The invoice URL is 'file:///workspace/assets/vendor_invoice.html'. The final PDF must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Invoices/invoice_8492_clean.pdf'. The clean invoice must contain the text 'Invoice #8492', 'Total:', and '1,240.50'. It MUST NOT contain the forbidden text: 'FLASH SALE', 'Chat with Agent', or 'We use cookies'.
